title: Farmer's Cutting: Blue Skies
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for Blue Skies
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) cutting board recipes for [Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- More dye from flora that give dye

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UB87WTC6/images/d2b507fe86916b0bf18cacffe7ba19067ec5257a.png) ![Flower Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UB87WTC6/images/361adb6f626356d736a176c3bc7d1d505395e82b.png)
